features: Instant digital sharing (text, email, AirDrop, QR code)
Online gallery delivered after the event

everyPackageIncludes: Complimentary travel within 30 miles of Hollywood

addons.name: Custom Welcome / Tap-to-Start Screen
addons.description: Your names, date, monogram, or logo displayed on the screen guests see before their first photo. Sets the tone the moment they step up

addons.name: Custom Rear Display / Branded Visuals
addons.description: A looping slideshow or branded visual that plays on the back of the booth, facing your guests all night. Think of it as a digital welcome sign that doubles as décor

addons.name: Custom Photo Template
addons.description: We design a one-of-a-kind photo strip layout around your event—your colors, fonts, graphics, and details. Two rounds of revisions included. This is what your guests take home

addons.name: Additional Custom Photo Template
addons.description: A second unique template design for the same event. Popular for offering guests a choice between two layouts, or switching designs between ceremony and reception

addons.name: B&W + Color Filter Set
addons.description: Guests choose between classic black-and-white or full color at the booth, switching freely all night. B&W adds a timeless, editorial feel that pairs well with formal events

addons.name: Glam Filter
addons.description: A subtle skin-smoothing filter applied in real time—softens blemishes, evens skin tone, whitens teeth, and enhances lighting. The difference is visible but never overdone. Our most-requested upgrade

addons.name: Magnetic Photo Sleeves
addons.description: Clear, protective magnetic sleeves that turn every print into a fridge-ready keepsake. Guests slide their photo strip or postcard print inside and it's instantly display-ready — no tape, no pins, no frames needed. One of those small touches that makes the night stick around long after the last photo.

addons.name: Premium Prop Bundle
addons.description: An upgraded set of curated, on-trend props. Clean, photogenic pieces that actually look good in the final print

addons.name: Premium Backdrop
addons.description: Step up from the standard backdrop to our premium collection. Richer textures and deeper colors that photograph beautifully under studio lighting

addons.name: Draped Backdrop - Ivory or Hunter Green
addons.description: Floor-to-length ivory or hunter green fabric, professionally draped and styled on-site to create a soft, textured backdrop with natural folds and dimension. Unlike flat backdrops, draped fabric catches your booth lighting in a way that adds depth and warmth to every photo—giving every shot a refined, editorial quality. Includes setup, styling, and breakdown. Our most elevated backdrop option

addons.name: Extra Time
addons.description: Keep the energy going and the booth running. Whether the night runs long or you want every moment covered from the first guest to the last dance—add hours so nothing goes uncaptured

addons.name: Early Setup
addons.description: We arrive 60–90 minutes before your event to set up and test everything. Need us there even earlier? This add-on gets us on-site ahead of our standard window so the booth is locked in and ready before your first guest walks through the door
